title: X may lose safe harbour for not acting on Rana Ayyub's tweets on Hindu deities, Savarkar: Centre to Delhi HC
description: The Central government and the Delhi Police told the Delhi High Court on Friday that social media platform X is liable to lose its safe harbour protection in India because it failed to act against Rana Ayyub’s allegedly offensive tweets about Hindu deities and RSS ideologue VD Savarkar. A short note filed before Justice Purushaindra Kumar Kaurav said that the police had issued notices in September 2025 and December 2025, requesting X to take down Ayyub’s tweets. Further, the government said
